title: Mini Resin Duck 32 Pcs Mini Ducks with Angel Shapes Cute Little Duck Glow in the Dark Bulk Tiny Ducks for Dollhouse Aquarium Garden Landscape Decor
features: 【Cute Little Duck Set】You will get 32 ​​mini ducks in 4 colors. These flashing ducks have a unique angel shape, which looks vivid, healing and cute. The quantity is enough to meet various needs such as scene arrangement and creative gifts.

【Exquisite Size】Our tiny ducks are available in two sizes, 0.63 inches and 0.59 inches. They are small and exquisite, easy to store and decorate, and do not take up too much space. To avoid accidental consumption, please keep them out of reach of young children.

【High-quality Material】Our little ducks are made of highly light-transmitting resin material, which is crystal clear, not easy to fade, waterproof and drop-proof. Whether it is miniature landscaping or handmade DIY, it can keep bright and new for a long time.

【Mini Luminous Ducks】These resin ducks have a luminous effect. After letting them absorb enough sunlight during the day, they can create a unique and dreamy luminous scene for you at night. The stronger the ultraviolet rays absorbed, the brighter the light they emit in the dark.

【Ideal Decoration】Whether you place these mini resin ducks on potted plants, in fish tanks or computer desktops as embellishments, or use them to decorate weddings or birthday parties, these little ducks can instantly enhance the atmosphere and add a touch of healing fun to life.
